issues.description: Condition should be 'Always', not 'HasRestingDon'. The card text shows 'DON!! −1 (You may...)' which is a cost mechanic, not a conditional requirement. The HasRestingDon condition checks if you have resting DON cards, but the effect should trigger whenever you play the card and you choose to pay the DON cost.
Target should specify 'upTo' modifier. The card says 'up to 1 of your opponent's Characters', meaning you can choose to rest 0 or 1 character, not exactly 1.
